resources.string: Vulkan hardware RT required. No fallback.
Samfa12.com could not be opened in your browser.
The benchmark requires the active Vulkan RT renderer.
The benchmark was interrupted before a complete report was generated.
The benchmark report could not be copied.
The benchmark report could not be saved.

LEFT HALF
Drag to walk and strafe

RIGHT HALF
Drag for 360° camera look

SWING
Tap the amber button to attack

MENU / BACK
Pause, restart, settings and diagnostics

Environment materials: Poly Haven — CC0.
https://polyhaven.com/

Sound effects: FilmCow Royalty Free Sound Effects Library — FilmCow custom royalty-free licence.
https://filmcow.itch.io/filmcow-sfx

Skeleton derivative: original Free Stylized Dark Fantasy Skeleton by Hotstrike Studio; texture, rig, and animation processing created with Meshy — CC BY 4.0.
https://hotstrikestudio.itch.io/free-stylized-skeleton

Placeholder lich character created and animated with Meshy — CC0.
https://www.meshy.ai/

Application icon created for this project with OpenAI image generation.

Full provenance and licence details:
https://github.com/Samfa12-tech/The-Horde-RT-demo/blob/main/ASSET_LICENSES.md
